jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Fortis Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Fortis Healthcare has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Fortis Healthcare:
Fortis Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortis Healthcare!
